item.action: Add specification-derived RFC 8785 conformance vectors to the canonical JSON digest implementation.

progress.finding: Self-authored unit tests are insufficient for canonicalization assurance; RFC number and UTF-16 ordering vectors provide an external specification oracle.
progress.verification: 3 deterministic Node tests passed: 24 finite IEEE 754 vectors, 2 non-finite rejection vectors, and the RFC UTF-16 property-order vector

item.handoff: Add the conformance test to the repository-wide gate and replay the same vectors through an independent JCS implementation. Preserve raw-byte digests separately from canonical semantic digests.
